notes: FROZEN (agent=no). Mistral Vibe 2.19.0's only shell primitive is the bash tool, schema {command, timeout} — no run_in_background parameter and no BashOutput/KillShell poll/kill tools (confirmed on both the live meta.json tools_available and vibe/core/tools/builtins/bash.py, whose run() blocks on proc.communicate() then kills the subprocess in finally). The agent cannot launch a detached process that outlives the turn and be polled to completion, so the #445/#450 working-while-bg arc has no agent behavior to elicit. No spec phases: nothing to observe. The vibe transcript carries no model/token/cost, so observations are model unknown, cost/tokens zero.
